Hypothesized Prototypes

Author

Jeffrey Girard

Published

May 19, 2025

library(tidyverse)
library(furrr)
library(kableExtra)
library(facs) # remotes::install_github("jmgirard/facs")

info <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds")

facs <- 
  read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/facs_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info) |> 
  mutate(event_id = str_c(subject, wave, facs_id, sep = "_"))

project_scheme <- scheme(
  list(
    occurrence = c(1:2, 4:39),
    intensity = c(1:2, 4:39),
    asymmetry = c(1:2, 4:39)
  )
)

protos <- 
  prototypes |> 
  filter(is.na(emotion_type) | emotion_type != "compound") |> 
  mutate(
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("anger", "angry"), "anger", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("confused", "confusion"), "confusion", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("desire", "desire food", "desire sex"), "desire", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("disgust", "disgusted"), "disgust", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("fear", "fearful"), "fear", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("happy", "happiness", "joy"), "happiness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("sad", "sadness"), "sadness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("surprise", "surprised"), "surprise", emotion)
  )
find_missing_aus <- function(proto, scheme, stringify = TRUE) {
  proto_codes <- pull_numcodes(proto)
  scheme_codes <- scheme$occurrence
  missing_aus <- setdiff(proto_codes, scheme_codes)
  if (stringify) {
    paste(missing_aus, collapse = ", ")
  } else {
    missing_aus
  }
}

find_remaining_aus <- function(proto_code, missing_aus) {
  proto_aus <- tidy(proto_code)[[1]]$occurrence
  missing_aus <- str_split(missing_aus, ", ")[[1]]
  remaining_aus <- setdiff(proto_aus, missing_aus)
  if (length(remaining_aus) > 0) {
    coding(paste(remaining_aus, collapse = "+"))
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
}

protos2 <-
  protos |> 
  arrange(emotion, source, config_num) |> 
  mutate(
    missing_aus = map_chr(code, \(x) find_missing_aus(x, project_scheme)),
    remaining_aus = map2_chr(code, missing_aus, \(x, y) find_remaining_aus(x, y))
  ) |> 
  filter(!is.na(remaining_aus))
write_csv(protos2, "proto_summary.csv")
protos2 |> 
  summarize(
    .by = remaining_aus,
    n_emotions = n_distinct(emotion),
    emotions = str_c(unique(emotion), collapse = ", ")
  ) |> 
  arrange(desc(n_emotions), remaining_aus) |> 
  filter(n_emotions > 1) |> 
  kbl() |> 
  kable_styling()
remaining_aus n_emotions emotions
6+7+12+25+26 4 amusement, coyness, happiness, triumph
6+7+12+25 3 coyness, desire, embarrassment
1+2+5 2 fear, surprise
1+2+5+25+26 2 fear, surprise
1+2+5+25+27 2 fear, surprise
1+2+5+26 2 fear, surprise
1+2+5+27 2 fear, surprise
12 2 contentment, happiness
4+7 2 anger, confusion
6+7+12+16+25+26 2 amusement, happiness
6+7+12+16+25+27 2 amusement, happiness 
plan("multisession", workers = 9)
occ_counts <- 
  facs |> 
  select(-month) |> 
  mutate(
    occ = future_map_chr(facs_code, function(x) {
      codes <- tidy(coding(x))[[1]]$occurrence
      paste(codes[codes %in% project_scheme$occurrence], collapse = "+")
    }),
    occ = na_if(occ, ""),
    occ = na_if(occ, "NA"),
    occ = coding(occ)
  ) |> 
  nest(.by = c(occ, wave), events = c(subject, event_id, facs_duration, session_duration))
merged <-
  crossing(
    occ = coding(sort(unique(c(occ_counts$occ, protos2$code)))), 
    wave = c(6, 9, 12, 15)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = occ_counts,
    by = join_by(occ, wave)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = protos2 |> mutate(remaining_aus = coding(remaining_aus)),
    by = join_by(occ == remaining_aus),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )
proto_waves <- 
  merged |> 
  drop_na(emotion) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(emotion, wave),
    all_events = list(bind_rows(events)),
    n_protos_total = n(),
    n_protos_occur = sum(map_lgl(events, \(x) !is.null(x))),
    n_subjects = map_int(
      all_events, 
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$subject)), 0)
    ),
    n_events = map_int(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$event_id)), 0)
    ),
    total_sec = map_dbl(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, sum(distinct(x)$facs_duration), 0)
    ),
    total_pct = total_sec / sum(info$session_duration),
    total_pct_str = sprintf("%.3f%%", total_pct * 100)
  ) |> 
  arrange(emotion, wave)
kbl(
  proto_waves |> 
    select(-all_events) |> 
    mutate(emotion = str_to_title(emotion)), 
  digits = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 4)
) |> 
  kable_styling()

proto_waves |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = str_to_title(emotion)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Window, y = total_pct, color = Emotion, shape = Emotion, group = Emotion)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_manual(values = scales::hue_pal()(21)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(c(21, 22, 24), length.out = 21)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2), shape = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
       color = "Emotion Category", shape = "Emotion Category") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("pct_window_emotion.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
proto_waves |> 
  filter(.by = emotion, max(total_pct) > 0) |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = str_to_title(emotion)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Emotion, y = total_pct, fill = Window)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 1/4, position = position_dodge()) + 
  scale_x_discrete() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(x = "Emotion Category", y = "Percentage of Video Frames", fill = "Age Window") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )
proto_waves |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = fct_rev(factor(str_to_title(emotion)))
  ) |> 
  filter(total_pct > 0) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = total_pct, y = Emotion, color = Window, fill = Window, shape = Window, group = Emotion)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 23, 24)) +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
    y = "Emotion Category",
    color = "Age Window",
    shape = "Age Window",
    fill = "Age Window"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("emotion_pct_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
proto_waves |> 
  summarize(.by = emotion, total_pct = mean(total_pct)) |> 
  mutate(Emotion = fct_rev(factor(str_to_title(emotion)))) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = total_pct, y = Emotion)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
    y = "Emotion Category",
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("emotion_pct.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
total_pcts <- 
  proto_waves |> 
  summarize(.by = emotion, total_pct = mean(total_pct))
top_n(total_pcts, n = 5, wt = total_pct) |> arrange(desc(total_pct))
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  emotion     total_pct
  <chr>           <dbl>
1 happiness    0.000846
2 contentment  0.000502
3 sadness      0.000231
4 interest     0.000118
5 surprise     0.000110
top_n(total_pcts, n = 5, wt = -total_pct) |> arrange(total_pct)
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  emotion          total_pct
  <chr>                <dbl>
1 embarrassment 0           
2 pain          0           
3 amusement     0.0000000863
4 coyness       0.0000000863
5 triumph       0.0000000863
